name: Kin Pang Holdings Limited
summary: Kin Pang Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the civil engineering business in Macau and Hong Kong. It operates through Building and Ancillary Services, and Emergency Repair Services segments. The Building and Ancillary Services segment is involved in the foundation associated works, hard landscaping, alteration and addition works, road works, water pipe works, electrical and mechanical works, and other ancillary building works. The Emergency Repair Services segment provides repair services for infrastructure of electricity and water supply on a term contract basis. The company also engages in the management of machineries. The company was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Macau. Kin Pang Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Fortunate Year Investments Limited.
